title: Launch Alpha Go/No-Go Criteria & Timeline
author: alice.chen
content:
GO/NO-GO CRITERIA — Launch Alpha (Checkout AI Assistant)
Author: Alice Chen | Last updated: 2026-04-23 14:00 UTC

Launch target: Monday 2026-04-28 09:00 PT
Go/no-go decision deadline: Sunday 2026-04-27 18:00 PT

GO criteria (all must be met):
1. Engineering: All P0/P1 tickets resolved, QA smoke test PASS
2. Design: All assets delivered and engineering sign-off complete
3. GTM: Launch email approved and scheduled
4. Security: No open critical CVEs in checkout flow
5. Legal: Pricing language approved

NO-GO triggers (any one blocks launch):
- Active P0 engineering blocker with no merge ETA by Sunday 18:00 PT
- QA smoke test failing at go/no-go time
- Legal hold on marketing materials

Escalation path:
- If NO-GO declared: delay to following Monday (2026-05-05)
- Notify: alice.chen, derek.vasquez, priya.mehta, sam.okafor, exec-team@novaloop.io

Go/no-go sync: Monday 2026-04-28 09:00 — Google Meet (all leads)
